# Dexterity Potion

## Effect

- Gain 2 Dexterity.

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.

- Stronger when saved for elite/boss turns with repeated block cards or Plating support; it can be worth taking over Blood Potion if Blood Potion can be cashed in immediately for meaningful HP.
